Author: Visual Studio Code
Title: 🔴 Let it Cook - Agent Host Protocol in VS Code
Description:
Discover the latest enhancements to VS Code's Agent Host Protocol in version 1.115! Join James, Burke, and Pierce as they showcase intelligent agent session management including file edit tracking, undo/redo capabilities, browser tab linking, and client state restoration. Explore how agents can now respond to client switches and interact with background terminals. Perfect for developers building agent-powered VS Code extensions and automation workflows.

🔗 Link: https://code.visualstudio.com

🎙️ Featuring: Burke Holland, Pierce Boggan, James Montemagno

#vscode
